overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a rocky cliffside during a heavy rainstorm at night. The scene appears to be from a video game, featuring atmospheric low lighting, visible rain streaks, and natural rock formations with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliffside path during heavy rainstorm

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the base of a rocky cliff in heavy rain, navigating uneven terrain

entered.detail: tall rock wall with layered sedimentary texture, partially covered in moss
low bushes and tall grass growing along the trail edge
dark silhouette of trees visible against the night sky in the background
large rocks scattered along the path surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly along a narrow path at the base of a rocky cliff during a heavy nighttime rainstorm. The rocky cliff face dominates the right side of the frame while scrub vegetation and boulders fill the foreground. In the distance, a dark forest canopy is barely visible against the stormy sky as rain streaks continuously fall through the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate, rain-swept cliffside under a heavy nighttime storm. It begins by gliding slowly along a narrow path, where the towering rock face of a cliff dominates the right side of the frame. As the camera advances, it pushes through a foreground of scattered boulders and scrub vegetation while rain streaks continuously blur the vision. The scene then opens up to reveal a dark, distant forest canopy barely visible against the oppressive, stormy sky.
